programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We take some of our favorite restaurant recipes—Crab Towers and Flambéed Pan-Roasted Lobster—and show you how to make them work in a home kitchen.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Huge meaty flavor—combined with spice, smoke, and fire—epitomizes Texas barbecue. Could we figure out how to make authentic Texas beef ribs in our Boston-based test kitchen?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: On occasion, we break the bank and buy a beef tenderloin. The tender, buttery interior is the big draw, and the combination of a healthy dose of seasoning and the flavor from the grill is a perfect solution to an otherwise mild-tasting piece of meat.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare grilled chicken with a sweet-and-sour dipping sauce and grilled salmon with a sweet, sticky glaze.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we prepare chicken enchiladas and Mexican rice.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sure, raw tomato sauces are fast, but if the sauce is watery and bland, who cares? Likewise, asparagus-based pasta sauces are often bland and boring. In this episode, we keep things simple while avoiding these common problems.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen prepares two Indian favorites: chicken biryani and mulligatawny soup.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pissaladière is Provençal street food, a fragrant, pizza-like tart prized for its contrast of salty black olives and anchovies against a backdrop of sweet caramelized onions and thyme. We figure out how to make a great version of this French classic.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Too often, eggplant Parmesan is a soggy, oily mess. And pasta with chicken and broccoli is heavy and bland. But after many tests in the kitchen, we've come up with recipes that give these simple, honest dishes the respect they deserve.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pasta all' amatriciana is perhaps Rome's most famous dish. Despite the fancy name, it's nothing more than long-strand pasta sauced with tomatoes, onion, bacon, and hot pepper flakes and dusted with cheese. We show you how to master this simple dish.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our goal was simple: Take French onion soup and baked goat cheese salad and make stellar versions of these bistro favorites.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A sticky bun should be neither dense nor bready, neither saturated with butter nor so sugary that it makes your heart race. The crumb should be tender and feathery and the sticky glaze gently chewy and gooey. Here's how we made ours.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Brownies are too often dull, and blondies (as well as congo bars, their coconut-flavored cousins) can be even worse, since they are even plainer. We decided to keep things simple while focusing on developing superior flavor and texture.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Cakes baked in Bundt and tube pans are popular for a variety of reasons. These pans make cakes that are especially attractive, and the cakes themselves tend to be pretty simple to prepare. In this episode, we make angel food and a chocolate Bundt cake.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We wanted to develop the perfect pumpkin cheesecake recipe, but we never figured it would take 30 cheesecakes to develop a great recipe worthy of the finest holiday dinner.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we take two modern classic desserts —a chocolate volcano cake and caramelized pears—and make them approachable for the home cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our hearty frittata is just as filling as an omelet, but a whole lot easier to prepare and serve. We also uncover the formula for the ideal quiche filling and deliver a tender, buttery pastry crust filled with moist, smooth custard.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode, we look at a few of our favorite Tex-Mex dishes: tomato salsa, quesadillas, and beef tacos.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The test kitchen shows you how to make two hearty soups: black bean and tortilla.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more synonymous with fall than butternut squash? In this episode, we explore two main-course squash recipes: a creamy, comforting soup perfect for serving on a busy weeknight and a rich, hearty risotto suitable for entertaining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We investigate inexpensive steaks and find out which were worth eating and how best to prepare them. We also take a look at a classic accompaniment to steak: mashed potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When most people think of dishes like lasagna and jambalaya, they think of labor-intensive weekend meals. In this episode, however, we develop versions that could be prepared on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Two old-fashioned dishes with modern appeal: Boston baked beans and chicken and dumplings. Neither requires fancy ingredients or expensive equipment, just a little time and effort.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What's for Sunday dinner? Around many American tables, it's meat and potatoes. Beef brisket is a good choice and a nice change from pot roast or beef stew. Although inexpensive and simple to prepare, brisket does pose some challenges to the cook.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: There are certain dinners we rely on again and again. We are particularly fond of roasting chicken and potatoes together in one pan. While the chicken roasts, its juices drip onto the potatoes, giving them a wonderfully rich crust and creamy flavor.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We develop a foolproof preparation for pork chops with vinegar and peppers—a modern version tangy and juicy enough to rival that prepared by an Italian grandmother. Next, we turn to pan-roasted pork tenderloin.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Gameday Scoreboard & Highlights
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ keeps you completely up to speed with highlights, top stories and in-game updates.

programme.title: Scoreboard Final
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: Morning Buzz
programme.desc: Start your day with the latest top sports headlines and highlights.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando Karen y Jimmy son tomados como rehenes en un restaurante después de que el robo de una joyería sale mal, intentan mantener a los otros clientes a salvo de los ladrones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo intenta verificar la identidad de Joe Smith (Christopher Lloyd), quien afirma haber servido en el U.S.S. Arizona durante el ataque a Pearl Harbor, y quiere ser enterrado allí después de su muerte.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y Fornell intentan localizar al líder de una red de narcotraficantes quienes suministraron drogas a la hija de Fornell. Asimismo, el equipo tiene que encargarse de un cadáver que desapareció de la sala de autopsias del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Una serie de recuerdos revelan detalles del primer caso de asesinato al cual Gibbs asistió cuando era muy joven y por el cual ingresó al NCIS. Así como su primer encuentro con Ducky quien recién había llegado a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando JJ y Jefe de Sección de Cruz son secuestrados, el UAC se adentra en la época de JJ en el Departamento de Estado para encontrar pistas sobre su desaparición y descubrir una misión secreta que ahora pone sus vidas en peligro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando el BAU investiga varios asesinatos en la zona de Pittsburgh, el equipo busca un par de sudes que trabajan en equipo. Además, García y Morgan comparten sus planes para el día de San Valentín con sus respectivas parejas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Una serie de recuerdos revelan detalles del primer caso de asesinato al cual Gibbs asistió cuando era muy joven y por el cual ingresó al NCIS. Así como su primer encuentro con Ducky quien recién había llegado a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/15/2017. In 2008, two-year-old Florida toddler, Caylee Anthony, vanishes. Her mother, Casey Anthony tells investigators Caylee has been kidnapped by her nanny, a woman Casey's family has never actually seen. But why? And where was Caylee?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 10/15/2017. In 2008, two-year-old Florida toddler, Caylee Anthony, vanishes. Her mother, Casey Anthony tells investigators Caylee has been kidnapped by her nanny, a woman Casey's family has never actually seen. But why? And where was Caylee?

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: Aired 4/7/2017. Ted Kacyznski's brother, the man who ultimately turned him in to the authorities, takes us behind the hunt that led to the capture of the Unabomber.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/20/2016. Bill Weir journeys to the heart of Cuba to meet America's distant neighbors, bracing for a tourist invasion.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/27/2016. More than two-thirds of babies in Iceland are born to unmarried parents. Will this nation be the first to let go of marriage completely?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/03/2016. America’s most iconic river sustains more than 40 million people in the West. But as populations boom and the waters recede, will it continue to flow?

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp. For one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems. Deputies sympathize with a woman who’s been put through the wringer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it. A talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details. A couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie. A chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump. A man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma. The discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect’s story. A deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who’s struggled with addiction for a decade. Security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun. A masked-up cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A biker with a history of stealing vehicles doesn’t know how to drive his motorcycle. A man in- between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man’s work van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift. A friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team comes together after Warrick is shot in a Las Vegas alleyway, on the ninth season premiere.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A hypnotist who uses her powers of persuasion to rob banks becomes the prime suspect in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a series of victims are found deceased seemingly in the middle of everyday activities, the CSIs must determine what is causing them to remain upright after death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the course of an investigation, the CSIs discover that their victim, a young woman who was murdered and found with several different blood types in her system, is the daughter of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates a case involving the world of domination, Grissom pays a visit to Lady Heather to help find some answers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: After a shooting involving a young boy occurs right in the middle of Koreatown, none of the witnesses will speak to the CSI team investigating the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a murder case from 12 years earlier comes to the forefront of a new CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a popular young singer is found dead outside an infamous Las Vegas nightclub, the CSI team uncovers a link between the present day crime and a murder from over 50 years ago.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a new murder leads to a connection with an infamous serial killer, Grissom secretly joins the class of well-known criminal pathologist Dr. Raymond Langston, to gain access to the killer and get a crack in the case.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Teresita insiste en acompañar a Hortensia en la cárcel. Ella se las ingeniará para que la metan presa. El director del penal pone a las Vivanco al abrigo de las burlas de las demás presas y de la dureza de los carceleros.

programme.title: Testigo
programme.desc: La viuda y madre de tres hijos, Annie Wilson, se gana la vida adivinando el futuro de los demás... a pesar de que el suyo se ha tornado más confuso de lo que ella misma puede ver.

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: Este éxito escalofriante y aclamado por la crítica acelerará sus corazones desde el principio hasta el fin.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Undertow, un legado de violencia
programme.desc: Ambientada en una zona sureña por la que no pasa el tiempo, Undertow es un thriller sobre dos hermanos que se escapan de casa con un secreto tras la muerte de su padre (Dermot Mulroney) y la llegada de su codicioso y atormentado tío (Josh Lucas).

programme.title: El callejón
programme.desc: Rosa es atrapada por un asesino en serie en una lavandería desierta escondida en un oscuro callejón. Después de horas de un sádico juego del gato y el ratón, descubre algo aún más perturbador sobre su agresor.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: Aires de esperanza
programme.desc: Del director Jason Reitman, Aires de Esperanza presenta a Kate Winslet y Josh Brolin como dos extraños que se conocen inesperadamente. Lo que comienza como un encuentro durante un fin de semana, se transforma en una segunda oportunidad para el amor.

programme.title: La boda de mi ex
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar, Anna Paquin y Katie Holmes, lideran un reparto estelar en The Romantics: una “comedia dramática” generacional sobre la amistad, la rivalidad y la lealtad.

programme.title: El apartamento
programme.desc: ¿Y si la mujer que amabas desapareciera sin una sola palabra? ¿Hasta qué punto volverías a encontrarla? Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Rose Byrne y Matthew Lillard protagonizan este intenso neonoir donde el amor se convierte en obsesivo.

programme.title: Fuerzas de la naturaleza
programme.desc: Ben está intentando llegar a Savannah para su boda. Una gaviota vuela hacia el motor de su avión cuando está despegando. Todos los vuelos más tarde se cancelan por un huracán, entonces hace dedo y lo lleva una atractiva mujer llamada Sara.

programme.title: Dos vidas contigo
programme.desc: ¿Quién sabía que cuando pidiera el especial, recibiría el plato de su vida? David Duchovny y Minnie Driver encienden chispas en esta historia afectuosa sobre un viudo y una camarera que parecían estar destinados a conocerse y enamorarse.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: Vaselina 2
programme.desc: Muchos de los personajes de la exitosa "Grease" regresan al campus, y los nuevos son igualmente memorables, en este tributo a las faldas tubo, la seducción y el amor entre jóvenes.

programme.title: El último desafío
programme.desc: Tras abandonar su puesto en el Depto de Narcóticos de DPLA, el sheriff Ray Owens (Schwarzenegger) se muda y establece en un pueblo tranquilo de la frontera, Sommerton Junction.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: Homicidio en la pasarela
programme.desc: El mariscal de los EE.UU. Jack Devlin intenta proteger a una joven de los gángsters. Desafortunadamente, la capacidad de Devlin para hacer su trabajo está restringida después de que una explosión lo cegó temporalmente.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Dean Cain y la superestrella de la WWE, ‘Big Show’, protagonizan Venganza, un thriller lleno de acción sobre un detective que busca implacablemente la venganza.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Casese Quien Pueda
programme.desc: The best-laid love plans go hilariously awry in this romantic-comedy hit about two sisters (Martha and Miriam Higareda) who find themselves in uncharted romantic territory.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Mañana es hoy
programme.desc: Verano de 1991. Toda la familia Gaspar está de vacaciones y, de repente, acaban transportados al 2022. ¿Lograrán regresar a los años 90?

programme.title: Afuera del tiempo
programme.desc: Ricardo siempre le ha terminado a todas sus novias, pero Sara le romperá el corazón justo cuando él le propone matrimonio. Para calmar su depresión visitará a un doctor que lo tratará a través de un tratamiento experimental.

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: Hansel y Gretel: Cazadores de brujas
programme.desc: Prepárate para una versión retorcida del cuento clásico. Convertidos en profesionales, Hansel y Gretel se enfrentan al trauma de su cautiverio infantil, asesinando brujas a sueldo.

programme.title: Piraña 3D
programme.desc: Un terremoto en Arizona abre una fisura en el fondo del lago Havasu, liberando decenas de pirañas prehistóricas que aterrorizan a la ciudad cercana.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Visitantes
programme.desc: Espíritus malignos atormentan a una exitosa doctora (Kate del Castillo) y a su familia, haciendo que enloquezcan y desconfíen el uno del otro.

programme.title: Y todos arderán

programme.title: Resucitados
programme.desc: Un grupo de investigadores médicos descubren una manera de revivir a los pacientes muertos.

programme.title: La lista de pendientes
programme.desc: Brandy, una excelente estudiante de preparatoria, desea estar bien "educada" antes de la universidad, por lo que arma una lista con las actividades sexuales que no ha podido practicar. Para esta tarea, Brandy le pide ayuda a su hermana y a su jefe.

programme.title: Los reyes pal palacio
programme.desc: Momentos divertidos al lado de los talentosos Miguel Céspedes y Raymond Pozo, con más de 600 programas de televisión producidos y viendo la sonrisa de la gente de manera directa en los espectáculos que han realizado en vivo.

programme.title: Torrente 5
programme.desc: El policía corrupto sale de la cárcel en el 2018 para encontrar una España diferente a la que conocía.

programme.title: De vuelta al colegio

programme.title: 13 asesinatos y medio

programme.desc: A famous cat burglar who has retired to the Riviera catches a thief imitating his old style.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: How can Hogan and his crew keep Sgt. Schultz from being transferred to the Russian Front?

programme.desc: The Gestapo sets a trap for the elusive underground agent known as 'Papa Bear' (Hogan) and Newkirk gets caught.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver's crops are getting stomped on by Irene the cow. In his frustration, he fires a shotgun to scare Irene away. Instead the blast leads to a hilarious misunderstanding among Lisa, Eb and a life-sized fiberglass cow.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has become the new School Board President. Unfortunately, Oliver's first day on the job is anything but smooth. Arnold the pig is expelled from his duties as the school's mascot, and Fred Ziffel implores Oliver to defend Arnold.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria are sure the romance has gone out of their marriage when even a weekend in the Poconos fails to reignite the spark.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude and Florida discover that male chauvinistic pigs come in all colors when Florida's husband demands she stops working for white people.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Twelve years ago, Joanne (Lois Nettleton) convinced two friends to testify against their pimp for the murder of a prostitute. Now, three convicts escape from prison, and one of them is out for revenge against the women who sent him to prison.

programme.desc: McGarrett pursues a Japanese mental patient determined to fulfill his assignment of 28 years ago — sabotage Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.desc: A respectable small-town salesman witnesses the murder of a prostitute but, afraid of personal embarrassment, refuses to testify.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett encounters a small guerrilla force who steals arms from an armory to support a revolution in their own country.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A radical Chinese Maoist student attending the university is found dead just as McGarrett has obtained evidence of his connection with the Communist intelligence ring.

programme.desc: J.R. tries to protect a beautiful young woman from a dangerous stalker and his two cronies, but they get trapped in a deadly situation with them. Barnaby gets suspicious that they are in trouble comes to their aid.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.desc: An untimely death threatens Al's Thanksgiving tradition; Kelly tries to a pet turkey from becoming a holiday dinner.

programme.desc: Peggy and Kelly team up as a singing duo for a talent contest in Branson, Missouri.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía descubre un carro agujereado de balas, un conductor extraviado y ningún testigo. ¿Será que la víctima fue raptada o ha sido asesinada?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores del hospital no pudieron determinar la causa de las alucinaciones y el intenso dolor de Bobby Curley. Lo trataron como un trastorno neurológico pero su estado se deterioró. Él estaba siendo envenenado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de un rico empresario estadounidense fue encontrado en su auto de alquiler. Los dientes y fragmentos de huesos fueron los únicos restos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mañana, en una zona desértica en las afueras de Phoenix, un motociclista descubre el cuerpo de una joven mujer. Había sido golpeada, amarrada, estrangulada y posiblemente violada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un policía fuera de servicio murió de un disparo, sus colegas oficiales estaban determinados a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, cuando Steven Fortin ataca a la Oficial de Policía Estatal de Maine fuera de su hora servicio, Vicky Gardner, durante una parada rutinaria, se desencadena una serie de eventos que reinician de golpe un caso de asesinato estancado en New Jersey.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Judy Southern llegó a casa del trabajo y recibió un disparo de un hombre armado que esperaba dentro. Su esposo llegó poco después, llamó a los servicios de emergencia y la llevó al hospital.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un bebé es trasladado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias con problemas respiratorios graves. En meses, hay más de 30 casos similares. ¿Pueden los médicos encontrar la causa y la cura?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick returns to Degrassi after the “Whack Your Brain” debacle at the hands of Spinner, Jay, and Alex. Toby and Mr. Raditch try to convince him to take the afternoon off, to go home and cool off, but an oddly calm Rick chooses to stay.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the shooting at Degrassi, the full school board counseling response team moves in. And so does the media. Local reporter, Rachel Roberts, has decided to make Sean the hero of her piece.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig has a problem – the recording deal he and his band won last year is about to expire, but “Downtown Sasquatch” is nowhere near ready to record. With Jimmy in the hospital, they’re missing a key member.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back with Ashley and he’s determined not to screw it up this time.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Distraught when Ashley refuses his proposal, Craig falls into a major rage, completely trashing his hotel room.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi has a new hottie in Grade 9 and Manny’s got her eye on him. Especially since her “boyfriend” Spinner can’t even be bothered to take a night off work to come to the Cupid Dance she’s organized.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Something’s wrong with Emma. Though she’s frustrated at being treated with kid gloves by everyone since the school shooting, she’s not sure how she’d rather be treated. So she just keeps going on, numbly reassuring everyone that she’s fine.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma steps into the lead role in Dracula, but her recent extra-curricular activities with Jay prove even more dramatic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner has difficulty dealing with the return of injured Jimmy. He hasn’t talked to him since the shooting, and his guilt over what he did leaves him unable to welcome Jimmy back to school.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie is finding it hard to make ends meet now that she’s living on her own and hates relying on her mother for rent, especially with its obligatory dinners to pick up the cheque.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige and Matt are totally in love, so what if they have to keep it secret? It’s worth all the extra effort.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With school coming to a close, Marco is making huge plans for his summer with Dylan – and their future. He’s considering fast-tracking to graduate high school, joining Dylan in university a year earlier.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dutifully picking up the Spirit Squad slack for a love-struck Paige all year, Manny feels betrayed when Paige claims all the glory. So Manny plots her revenge with a complicated cheer that leaves Paige with a broken leg on Prom Night.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley’s leaving for the summer, and the idea of their temporary farewell and the stress of writing a song for Kevin Smith’s movie -- is making him, well, nuts. So Craig decides to do whatever it takes to follow her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated by everything around him, Craig runs away. As he wanders the street, he befriends a young busker nicknamed, “Skinny”.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Paige and Spinner awkwardly discuss last night's surprising kiss-fest, Darcy interrupts. She regrets their fight and breakup. But Spinner tells her he meant what he said – if Darcy can’t accept him, past and all, they're through.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Another year at Degrassi kicks off and Manny decides she’s going to be a serious actress, whatever it takes.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s still foggy on what exactly it was that happened at Peter’s party the night before. She knows she made a pretty racy video but Peter will erase everything… or so he says.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has got her whole life mapped out. She plans on being accepted into the marketing program at the best university in Canada.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: JT has got his license. He’s got a steady girlfriend in Liberty, who happens to be Student Council President. So why is he feeling anything but a “man”? Because Liberty’s in control.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After all the craziness of last year, Craig has one overriding goal: no drama. He’s focused on his friends, his family, his studies, and his band – a reconstituted Downtown Sasquatch but no Spinner - a new addition is rocking the drum-kit…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After proving he’s still got talent on the hardwood, Jimmy is invited to try out for the Wheelchair Basketball Association’s Junior Team. It’s Jimmy’s second chance at athletic stardom, and an opportunity to make his father proud.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Liberty’s pregnancy enters its sixth month, she and JT are forced to face reality: even though no longer a couple, they have to deal with the pregnancy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, JT has stolen drugs from the pharmacy… He becomes entangled in a web between his boss, the drug dealer, and the police.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Someone’s definitely interested in Marco. But as it turns out, Tim is interested in Marco, but not for the expected reason. Tim knows Marco is gay, and has been struggling with how to come out to his friends and family.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The one-year anniversary of the school shooting is approaching and everyone’s feeling the weight of it. Not least of whom is Spinner Mason, still persona non grata.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight is the premiere of “Jay and Silent Bob Go Canadian, Eh” and with many of the students and faculty on the guest list, it’s like the whole school is gripped in movie premiere fever!

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor is eager to make peace between the Sea Devils and the humans but has discovered that the Master is up to his old tricks.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to persuade Captain Hart of the danger that the Master represents. Eager to make contact with the Sea Devils, the Doctor journey's to the sea bed.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Sea Devils
programme.desc: The Sea Devils come to the surface and attack the Naval base. The Doctor is forced to create a machine that will awaken the creatures across the entire world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: Ky flees to the planet's poisonous surface taking Jo with him while the Marshal, holding the Doctor captive, demands that he opens the message pod.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor searches for Jo in the caves of Solos. In the shadows the mutants prepare to attack.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sondergaard make an amazing discovery in the caves of Solos while Jo falls into the Marshal's trap.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants
programme.desc: The Marshal's plans for Solos go disastrously wrong. Can the Doctor save the doomed planet in time to save Jo's life?

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Mutants

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: Masquerading as research scientist, Professor Thascales, the Master is using a device called TOMTIT to summon an ancient and powerful creature from beyond time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster
programme.desc: The Doctor tracks the Master down to the Newton Institute. There, after a disastrous attempt to summon Kronos, the Master prepares to use TOMTIT once again.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Time Monster

programme.desc: A woman's French bulldog exhibits people aggression that started for no apparent reason when he turned two years old.

programme.desc: Two German shepherds who get along fine at home, but are at each other's throats when at daycare; a miniature schnauzer that barks when her owner's grandchildren visit.

programme.desc: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: The Angel's Secret
programme.desc: Many know its name; few have seen it. Once present throughout Europe, the angel shark is now critically endangered and finds itself struggling off the coast of the Canary Islands. As unique as it is extraordinary, this species is full of secrets...

programme.title: The Animal Communicator
programme.desc: What if you could talk to animals and have them talk back to you? Anna Breytenbach has dedicated her life to communication. She sends messages to animals through pictures and thoughts, and receives messages back!

programme.title: Supersonic: The Great Adventure
programme.desc: From Chuck Yeager's successful breaking of the sound barrier in 1947 to high performance supersonic fighter jets, to the recent NASA advances in civilian jet projects, this documentary recounts 70 years of human and technological challenges.

programme.title: Singapore's Field Of Dreams
programme.desc: This is an engineering story about building the world's ultimate multi-function sports complex.

programme.title: Sharks, Scavengers of the Seas
programme.desc: Before being an earthly paradise with enchanting colours, the lagoon of New Caledonia is above all a paradise for sharks. But not just any sharks: they are used to being considered as fearsome predators, they are essentially opportunistic scavengers.

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five
programme.desc: The ocean has its own Big Five. Featuring great whites, to hammerheads, tigers, bulls, and the intimidating whale shark, this is the ultimate shark show.

programme.title: Secret Seychelles: D'Arros
programme.desc: D'Arros is one of the Seychelles' best kept secrets. Safe-guarded by isolation, the island is a jewel of the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: Search for the Great Sharks
programme.desc: From the coast of California to the remote reaches of South and Western Australia, this film pursues blue sharks, whale sharks, and the notorious great white to allow viewers an up-close experience.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions are on the hunt for giraffe. Meanwhile, researcher Rae accompanies the lions as they encounter nervy hartebeest. The game capture unit are tasked with supplying more zebra for the Ngama release site.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Phyre has to be darted to keep the balance in the pride healthy, while Pazza shows off her highly possessive nature with an unsuspecting tortoise. And Milo demonstrates why he wears the pants around here.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We follow the as they walk and stalk. Meat preparation gets weird for some as our volunteers make dinner time more interesting. A brave zebra stallion takes the fight to the ever confident lions.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: The lions attempt to dig a stubborn warthog out of his hole, while an influx of volunteers have arrived and Nathan instructs them with an induction talk on how to treat, walk and cope with lions.

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: We get a first peek at the adorable additions in the denning enclosure. Lewa and Laili take their hunting skills to a new level and tackle a kudu, and we find out what Rae's doing with hyena poo!

programme.title: Roaring With Pride
programme.desc: Penya and Paza encounter a python; the adorable cubs go on their first bush outing; Lewa and Laili keep the zebra on their toes. Meanwhile, the research team have more experiments for the Ngamo lions.

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: As Ghost and Tommy move forward with their plan to kill Jason, Tommy enacts a plan of his own; Dre uses a ruse to force Tommy's organization to rebel against him; Tommy battles the kin of one of his past victims.

programme.title: Power

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Everyone knows Bigfoot, an enormous truck that crushes everything in its path. Contestant descends into 10-foot high tank filled with water and ribbon snakes. Suspended from a 40 ton crane hangs a clear Plexiglas box.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Three steel girders are attached to a crane, 100 feet off the ground. Contestant walks on broken glass. A car is held up by an electromagnetic crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Our contestants will have to negotiate 70-ton crane with a seesaw. Contestants eat cooked deer, elk, beef or water buffalo pisel, penis. Our contestants will try to walk across a series of swings.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The Big Tujunga Dam towers hundreds of feet high. Contestant's head and shoulders will be covered in bees. The contestants will lie in a small Plexiglas coffin which has holes drilled in the bottom and on the sides.

programme.title: Fear Factor

programme.desc: Contestants will climb up 4 stories on a hook and ladder with 70 pounds of gear. Contestant must lay in a pit for 2 minutes while scorpions are dropped on them. Contestants will be put on a platform suspended from a crane 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants fall out of a speeding helicopter. Contestant must consume 10 live slugs and a shot of cow bile. Each contestant must cross between two buildings by placing three planks in front of them on top of two tight ropes as they walk.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be placed on a 20 foot rope ladder. Contestants play a game to determine quantity of food they will have to eat. Contestant must walk across a 12 inch wide and 60 foot long beam suspended 100 feet in the air.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, San Francisco pornographer Artie Mitchell was murdered in his home. His brother and business partner, who was found near the scene carrying a rifle, later confesses to shooting Artie.The question is whether the shooting was premeditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, when off-duty Maine State Trooper Vicky Gardner is attacked by Steven Fortin during a routine stop, it triggers a chain of events which jumpstart a stalled murder case in New Jersey.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman and her daughter didn't return home from shopping, her husband directed police to a nearby mall. The child's body was found, but there was no sign of the wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: While battling one of Kamdor's monsters, the Rangers get their computer systems infected with a virus. This exposes the deep secret of Mack's true nature to the Red Ranger, as he learns everything he ever knew was a lie!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: After learning about his true robotic nature, Mack starts to go through an identity crisis. When the Rangers battle Crazar, a Fearcat from Tyzonn's past, the Mercurian reveals unexpected things.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Mig and Benglo use the power of the Octavian Chalice, and unleash the mighty Agrios, a giant robotic creature that proves to be stronger than all the Rangers' Zords!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The dolls record a single and perform before a live audience. RuPaul is joined by extra special guest judges Jody Watley & Carmen Elektra. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens wig out when they have to compete in a fantasy hair show. RuPaul is joined by extra special guest judges American Idol Fantasia Barrino & comedian-TV host Wayne Brady. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Wild Austria
programme.desc: Take a cinematic journey through Austria's stunning geography, where water is life. Glide through snow-capped Alpine highlands and the last primeval forests, across powerful glaciers and raging waterfalls, and over a warm steppe lake.

programme.title: The Canary Islands
programme.desc: The impacts the modern world has had on the Canary Islands' secluded wildlife and how some species are surviving on the edge of extinction.

programme.title: Islands in a Desert Sea
programme.desc: Explore the rich, biodiverse Sea of Cortez, where survival hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: Shetland's Otters
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the shy, sweet otters that live in these remote islands.

programme.title: The Beach: Wildlife Around the Parasol
programme.desc: Taking a look at the breathtaking microcosm of nature that unfolds on the world's beaches.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Exploring Australia's forest floors and canopies to reveal the poisonous, fiercest and deadliest animals, insects and even plant life.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: Exploring Australia's complex waterways to reveal the continent's deadliest animals, from snakes and crocodiles to archer fish and sea eagles.

programme.title: Hotspots
programme.desc: The species of Madagascar have evolved over millions of years in isolation.

programme.title: Secrets of Wild Australia
programme.desc: A vast island continent of almost 3 million miles, Australia is home to many unusual animals on the planet.

programme.title: Wild Korea
programme.desc: Korea is known as a modern, high-tech nation, but beyond the bustle of the cities exists a land of stunning natural beauty and remarkable wildlife including the beautiful goshawk, the bottleneck dolphin and the curious raccoon dog.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Charting the long-term recovery of wildlife in the aftermath of Australia's catastrophic bushfires through stories of hope, human intervention and resilience; an urgent message to safeguard the environment before it is too late.
